meta.description: Smell index for Livewire. Maps to rubric.json rule_ref.

smells.name: Action without authorisation
smells.summary: Public Livewire method mutates state without Gate or Authorize attribute.

smells.name: Whole model on the wire
smells.summary: Public property holds full Eloquent model or sensitive columns.

smells.name: Blocking I/O on request thread
smells.summary: Http::, Mail::, or long loop inside Livewire action.

smells.name: Live binding without debounce
smells.summary: wire:model.live on chatty inputs with no debounce or blur.

smells.name: N+1 in component output
smells.summary: Relations accessed in Blade or computed without eager load.

smells.name: Uploads without validation
smells.summary: Temporary upload path without rules or WithFileUploads.

smells.name: Heavy dispatch payload
smells.summary: dispatch sends whole models or large blobs to the client.

smells.name: Explicit eager loading
smells.summary: with() or load() in component shows performance awareness.
